semantic.role: Protocol type barrel file aggregating all shared type definitions for the ArchSpine governance layer.
responsibilities: Acts as the single import entry point for all protocol-level types (config, documents, languages, manifest, rules, versions).
Encapsulates the internal module structure of the protocol types directory, providing a stable public API surface.
Preserves compatibility by re-exporting individual modules without adding or modifying symbols.
outOfScope: Business logic or data manipulation — this module contains only re-exports.
Implementation of types — all type definitions reside in the re-exported submodules.
Runtime behavior — this module is purely declarative with no executable code.
invariants: All exports from the re-exported submodules are part of this module's contract; any change in those submodules changes the public surface.
This module must not define new types or functions locally; it must remain a pure barrel file.
Interface names in the re-exported modules must conform to the 'I' prefix rule (enforced by rule interface-prefix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Centralize protocol type definitions into a single barrel export to simplify imports across the codebase and establish a clear public API boundary for the protocol layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No changes detected in this file from the git log; the file structure aligns with the v1.0.0 intent to provide a stable protocol abstraction.

publicSurface.description: Re-exports all symbols from './config.js', providing configuration-related type definitions (e.g., project config schema, environment settings).
Re-exports all symbols from './index-documents.js', providing type definitions for indexed document structures used in search and retrieval.
Re-exports all symbols from './languages.js', providing type definitions for supported programming languages and language detection.
Re-exports all symbols from './manifest.js', providing type definitions for the ArchSpine manifest format.
Re-exports all symbols from './rules.js', providing type definitions for architectural rules and rule enforcement.
Re-exports all symbols from './versions.js', providing type definitions for protocol versioning and compatibility.
